sentences.target: Il y a de nombreux taxis ici.

translations.fr: Il y a de nombreux taxis ici.
translations.ar: هناك الكثير من سيارات الأجرة هنا.
translations.ja: ここにはタクシーがたくさんあります。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/dummy subject pronoun in the existential construction “il y a”; 3rd person singular, no concrete referent.
Clitic adverbial pronoun meaning ‘there’; forms part of the fixed expression “il y a” and marks a locative complement.
3rd person singular present of ‘avoir’; lexical verb in the idiom “il y a” meaning ‘there is/are’.
Preposition introducing a quantified plural noun phrase (“de nombreux taxis”); functions like a partitive/quantifying marker.
Adjective meaning ‘many/numerous’; attributive premodifier agreeing in number with the head noun (masculine plural).
Common noun, masculine plural; head of the object NP in the existential construction.
Adverb of place indicating location for the clause.

sentences.target: Nous recevons de nombreux messages chaque jour.
sentences.reading: /nu ʁəsəvɔ̃ də nɔ̃bʁø mɛsaʒ ʃak ʒuʁ/

translations.fr: Nous recevons de nombreux messages chaque jour.
translations.ipa: /nu ʁəsəvɔ̃ də nɔ̃bʁø mɛsaʒ ʃak ʒuʁ/
translations.en: We get many messages every day.
translations.es: Recibimos muchos mensajes todos los días.
translations.de: Wir bekommen jeden Tag viele Nachrichten.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们每天都会收到很多消息。
translations.yue: 我哋每日都會收到好多訊息。
translations.ru: Мы получаем много сообщений каждый день.
translations.pt: Recebemos muitas mensagens todos os dias.
translations.he: אנחנו מקבלים הרבה הודעות كل יום.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi nhận được nhiều tin nhắn mỗi ngày.
translations.ar: نستلم الكثير من الرسائل كل يوم.
translations.nl: We krijgen elke dag veel berichten.
translations.hi: हम हर दिन बहुत सारे संदेश प्राप्त करते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi får mange meldinger hver dag.
translations.id: Kami menerima banyak pesan setiap hari.
translations.sv: Vi får många meddelanden varje dag.
translations.ro: Primim multe mesaje în fiecare zi.
translations.da: Vi får mange beskeder hver dag.
translations.ja: 私たちは毎日たくさんのメッセージを受け取ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; denotes the action performed by the subject.
Preposition introducing a quantified plural NP (“de nombreux messages”) functioning as direct object of the verb.
Adjective ‘many/numerous’; premodifier of “messages”, masculine plural agreeing with the noun.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of “recevons”.
Indeclinable determiner meaning ‘each’; introduces a temporal NP.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the temporal NP “chaque jour” functioning as an adverbial (time) modifier.

sentences.target: Les quartiers sont nombreux dans la ville.
sentences.reading: /le kaʁtje sɔ̃ nɔ̃bʁø dɑ̃ la vil/

translations.fr: Les quartiers sont nombreux dans la ville.
translations.ipa: /le kaʁtje sɔ̃ nɔ̃bʁø dɑ̃ la vil/
translations.en: There are many neighborhoods in the city.
translations.es: Hay muchos barrios en la ciudad.
translations.de: In der Stadt gibt es viele Viertel.
translations.it: In città ci sono molti quartieri.
translations.vi: Trong thành phố có nhiều khu phố.
translations.ar: هناك العديد من الأحياء في المدينة.
translations.nl: Er zijn veel wijken in de stad.
translations.nb: Det er mange bydeler i byen.
translations.id: Di kota ini ada banyak lingkungan.
translations.sv: Det finns många stadsdelar i staden.
translations.da: Der er mange kvarterer i byen.
translations.ja: この街にはたくさんの地区があります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural; marks definiteness of the noun phrase.
Common noun, masculine plural; subject of the sentence.
Auxiliary ‘être’ used as copula; 3rd person plural present linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective meaning ‘numerous’; masculine plural agreeing with the subject “quartiers”.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for “ville”.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition “dans”.

sentences.target: On voit de nombreux chiens au parc.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ vwa də nɔ̃bʁø ʃjɛ̃ o paʁk/

translations.fr: On voit de nombreux chiens au parc.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ vwa də nɔ̃bʁø ʃjɛ̃ o paʁk/
translations.en: We see many dogs in the park.
translations.es: Vemos muchos perros en el parque.
translations.de: Wir sehen viele Hunde im Park.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在公园里看到很多狗。
translations.yue: 我哋喺公園見到好多狗。
translations.ru: В парке мы видим много собак.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thấy nhiều con chó trong công viên.
translations.ar: نرى الكثير من الكلاب في الحديقة.
translations.nl: We zien veel honden in het park.
translations.uk: Ми бачимо багато собак у парку.
translations.hi: हम पार्क में बहुत से कुत्ते देखते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi ser mange hunder i parken.
translations.id: Kami melihat banyak anjing di taman.
translations.sv: Vi ser många hundar i parken.
translations.da: Vi ser mange hunde i parken.
translations.ja: 公園でたくさんの犬を見ます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personally inclusive pronoun (‘one’/colloquial ‘we’); subject, 3rd person singular form.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; denotes the perception action.
Preposition introducing a quantified plural NP (“de nombreux chiens”) as the direct object.
Adjective ‘many/numerous’; premodifier of “chiens”, masculine plural.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of “voit”.
Contraction of preposition ‘à’ + definite article ‘le’; introduces the locative PP “au parc”.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘au’ (locative complement).

Les quartiers sont nombreux dans la ville.
